So I just did a thing.. 🙈
I've always wanted a pink hair girl ape.. and just seen one close to floor. Had to buy some sol and grab it. 😄

I may not have many V1s.. but the ones I have I hold close to my heart. 💜🌸 isn't she lovely? 😍
